content:
🎯 Goal

We need to implement the coreFilterEngine for the objUtils module. Currently, the arrUtils has a fully functional coreFilterEngine (built by me), but the object counterpart is waiting for some open-source magic!

This is a perfect opportunity for beginners who want to make their first contribution to an open-source project.

🛠️ What needs to be done?

• Look at how coreFilterEngine is implemented in arrUtils for inspiration.

• Implement a similar filtering engine in objUtils that can filter object properties based on a predicate function or criteria.

• Ensure it handles edge cases (e.g., empty objects, nested objects if applicable).

💡 Where to start?

• Check out the current implementation in: src/arrUtils/coreFilterEngine.js

• You will be working inside: src/objUtils/

🤝 How to contribute?

• Comment below stating that you want to work on this, and I will assign it to you.

• Fork the repository and create a new branch.

• Write your code and open a Pull Request (PR).

If you need any help or guidance, just ask here! Let's build this together. 💻✨

🔗https://github.com/OmarPGH/RozFil/issues/1
